subject: 7 envelopes queued across 4 domain queues
body: product-management: 3 tasks (schedule + e2m wiring). engineering: 2 tasks (build + plugin). data: 1 task (dim seed). design: 1 task (token audit). Highest priority: a1b2c3d4-0003 (e2m package.json, 0.5h, ke_fit=5)

subject: Verify 5-agent manifest and dispatch first task to each domain agent
body: Read cowork/agents/manifest.json. For each agent entry, confirm SKILL.md exists and mailbox dir exists. Then dispatch one seed task to each agent mailbox. Write result to product-management queue as completed envelope.
